2606.31099.title: Seeing Through Multiple Views: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning via Selective Neurons for Consistent Radiology Report Generation
2606.31099.paper_summary: Recent years have seen substantial advances in radiology report generation (RRG), yet existing approaches predominantly adopt direct feature fusion when handling multi-view X-ray images. Such approaches overlook the potential clinical inconsistencies and inaccuracies arising when a single model processes different views, adversely impacting performance and clinical reliability. To this end, we introduce View-PNDF (View-specific Pattern Neuron Detection and Fine-tuning), a parameter-efficient framework that fosters view-consistent report generation from a neuronal perspective. Specifically, View-PNDF comprises: (i) a view-specific neuron detection module identifying neurons responsive to particular views, (ii) a verification module quantifying the existence of these neurons, and (iii) a selective fine-tuning strategy strengthening detected neurons while preserving view-agnostic representations. By updating only view-specific neurons, View-PNDF achieves consistent diagnoses across different views with reduced computational costs. Subsequently, we employ Large Language Models (LLMs) to consolidate the view-specific reports into a complete radiology report. Furthermore, we use traditional Natural Language Generation (NLG) metrics-based assessment on integrated reports for baseline comparison and employ LLM-based assessment (e.g., GPT-4o) on view-specific reports to capture clinical significance. Extensive experiments on two medical RRG benchmarks demonstrate that View-PNDF substantially improves view-specific chest X-ray report generation quality while maintaining robust general-view performance.
2606.31099.paper_summary_zh: 近年來，放射學報告生成（RRG）取得了重大進展，但現有的方法主要在處理多視角X光影像時採用直接特徵融合。這些方法忽略了當單一模型處理不同視角時可能出現的臨床不一致性和不準確性，對性能和臨床可靠性產生不利影響。為此，我們提出了View-PNDF（視角特定模式神經元檢測與微調），這是一個參數高效的框架，從神經元的角度促進視角一致的報告生成。具體而言，View-PNDF包括：（i）一個視角特定神經元檢測模塊，識別對特定視角有反應的神經元；（ii）一個驗證模塊，量化這些神經元的存在；（iii）一個選擇性微調策略，加強檢測到的神經元，同時保留視角無關的表示。通過僅更新視角特定的神經元，View-PNDF在不同視角之間實現了一致的診斷，同時降低了計算成本。隨後，我們利用大型語言模型（LLMs）將視角特定報告整合成完整的放射學報告。此外，我們對整合報告使用傳統的自然語言生成（NLG）指標進行評估以作為基線比較，並對視角特定報告使用基於LLM的評估（例如，GPT-4o）來捕捉臨床意義。在兩個醫療RRG基準上進行的廣泛實驗表明，View-PNDF顯著提高了視角特定胸部X光報告生成的質量，同時保持了穩健的全視角性能。
2606.31099.author: Yucheng Chen et.al.
2606.31099.authors: Yucheng Chen, Jinjing Zhu, Yang Yu, Yufei Shi, Hane Naghshbandi, Jinhua Liu, Angela S. Koh, Fang Fen, Kian Eng Ong, Si Yong Yeo
